creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Herbert J. Skuhra from comment #11)

That sounds great!  I have CC'ed the maintainer and last committer to touch databases/sqlcipher so they can look into updating the port to set that option.  If you don't receive a response, I recommend that you file a bug report with the desired patch to go through the official channel.

As long as that is not done, it's ok for you to bundle this dependency.  Did you figure out how to unbundle OpenSSL?
